Jwt._comment: Symmetric HS256/HS512 key. Configure via env: Jwt__Key, Jwt__Issuer, Jwt__Audience. Do NOT commit real keys.

ConsumerJwt._comment: Symmetric HS256/HS512 key used by Kafka Consumer to decode Authorization tokens from business services. Configure via env: ConsumerJwt__Key, ConsumerJwt__Issuer, ConsumerJwt__Audience. Do NOT commit real keys.
